title: Bow to Wand
description: Changes the bow to an animated 3D wand model, Harry Potter style.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ca3f86731f74757c4f5823117805544158d9e51.png)
![Description: Changes the bow texture toa 3D wand! Includes changing the arrow texture and sounds to fit better with the pack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4cfca8ced4a300296c83b970a627730fb079f7f8.png)\
![The Model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e62cdde781f751a209c3ccfdc5c5fd9ad8837aa7.gif)
